languages.text: "Паскаль, активируй протоколы обороны. Мы должны задержать их любой ценой".

traits.locale_text: "Паскаль, активируй протоколы обороны. Пусть служители Омниссии выжгут угрозу дотла".

languages.text: "Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."
languages.original_text: "Паскаль, активируй протоколы обороны. Мы должны задержать их любой ценой".

traits.locale_text: "Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."
"Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."
"Pasqal, activate the defence protocols. Let the servants of the Omnissiah reduce the threat to ashes."
"Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."
"Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."

languages.text: “帕斯卡，启动防御协议。必须不惜一切代价挡住他们。”
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."

traits.locale_text: “帕斯卡，启动防御协议。必须不惜一切代价挡住他们。”

languages.text: «Pasqal, active los protocolos de defensa. Debemos resistir, cueste lo que cueste».
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."

traits.locale_text: «Pasqal, active los protocolos de defensa. Debemos resistir, cueste lo que cueste».

languages.text: « Pasqal, activez les protocoles de défense. Nous devons à tout prix les repousser. »
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."

traits.locale_text: Pasqal, activez les protocoles de défense. Nous devons à tout prix les repousser.

languages.text: "Pasqal, savunma protokollerini etkinleştir. Ne pahasına olursa olsun onları durdurmalıyız."
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."

traits.locale_text: "Pasqal, savunma protokollerini etkinleştir. Ne pahasına olursa olsun onları durdurmalıyız."

languages.text: "Pasqal, aktiviert die Abwehrprotokolle. Wir müssen sie aufhalten, koste es, was es wolle."
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, activate defence protocols. We must hold them back, whatever it takes."

traits.locale_text: Pasqal, aktiviert die Abwehrprotokolle. Wir müssen sie aufhalten, koste es, was es wolle.

languages.text: 「パスカル、防衛プロトコルを起動せよ。オムニシアのしもべが脅威を灰にするのを許すな」
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, activate the defence protocols. Let the servants of the Omnissiah reduce the threat to ashes."

traits.locale_text: 「パスカル、防衛プロトコルを起動せよ。オムニシアのしもべが脅威を灰にするのを許すな。」
